evals.name: full-pipeline-benchmark
evals.prompt: Run a full pipeline benchmark on eda-workspace/test-datasets/churn_data.csv with target='churned'. I need completeness, correctness, and reproducibility scores.
evals.expected_output: Should execute full pipeline and score on completeness (EDA, features, model, eval, docs), correctness (no leakage, metrics valid), and reproducibility (fingerprint, seeds, methodology doc).

assertions.text: EDA report generated with quality assessment
Feature engineering with leakage risk assessment
Cross-validation metrics reported, not just test set
Data fingerprint and random seeds recorded
